lore.english:
Taimanin, mother of Mizuki Yukikaze. Once renowned as a brave Taimanin, she temporarily retired from dangerous missions after Yukikaze's birth, to work as Igawa Asagi's advisor. However, she was forced to return to the field after her husband was killed in action.

Although she claims to be "out of shape compared to her best days", her skills are on a par with the 'Almighty' Igawa Asagi. She is known and dreaded by the denizens of the dark side as the "Phantom", the "one-man army".

User of "Water Art". [FFFF00FF]"Geneijin"[-], an extremely rare skill even among Water Art users, allowing her to mold water skillfully into illusions. She can use the illusion as a decoy to mislead incoming attacks, or as a weapon to attack the enemies. Useful in both offense and defense.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Spear Art: Crescent Moon[-]
skills.description:
Jumps in front of the enemy and attacks by striking down with a spear.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:130102]%)[-] [&SpdDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:130102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:130102] turn(s)

Jumps in front of the enemy and attacks by striking down with a spear.
Target hit is inflicted with ([V3:130102]%) [&SpdDown] at a [R:130102]% chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:130102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Water Art: Crushing Wave[-]
skills.description:
Creates a huge wave and sends it to the enemy,
target is inflicted with [&Restraint] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:130202]%[-] chance.
If the target has 3 or more [&DeBuff]s, [V3:130203] [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&DeBuff] turns are increased by [V2:130203] turn(s).
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:130202] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Water Art: Genejin[-]
skills.description:
Summons a water clone and grants [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] a [&Shield] equal to [&Color_Cyan]([V3:130301]%)[-] of allies' Max. [&HP].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:130301] turn(s)
Grants [&DeBuffBlock] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:130302] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Phantom Taimanin[-]
skills.description: When attacking an enemy while the character has [&Shield], reduces the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:130401]%[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:130401]%[-] chance.
